Localization.Description: Logging was disabled or its settings were changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Logging was disabled on the Eltex switch with address {event_src.host}
"{object.name}" was disabled on the Eltex switch with address {event_src.host}
Logging settings were changed using command "{object.process.cmdline}" on the Eltex switch with address {event_src.host}
